domain.description: Top level entities that describe a Brands industry
domain.name: Brand Vertical

domain.description: Entity Service top level domain, every item that is in Entity Service should be in this domain
domain.name: Entities [Entity Service]

domain.description: Categories within Brand Verticals that narrow down the scope of Brands
domain.name: Business Taxonomy

entity.description: Brands, companies, advertisers and every non-person handle with the profit intent related to movies, music, television, franchises, venues, theme parks, toys, tourism, hotels
entity.name: Entertainment & Leisure Business

domain.description: Categories within Brand Verticals that narrow down the scope of Brands
domain.name: Business Taxonomy

entity.description: Brands, companies, advertisers and every non-person handle with the profit intent related to offline and online games such as gaming consoles, tabletop games, video game publishers
entity.name: Gaming Business

domain.description: Franchises which span multiple forms of media like 'Harry Potter'
domain.name: Multimedia Franchise

entity.description: This entity includes all conversation about the franchise, as well as any individual installments in the series, if applicable. **NOTE: Annotations redirected to domain 130 ONLY on 8/7/18.
entity.name: Pokémon

entity.name: Pokémon

data.text: 对象哥抖音有15万粉但是三年没更新了，现在他想跟我一起搞这个号，我再创一个号形成我的ip，像次蓝、炸鸡那种，但是我叫闪焰王牌跟宝可梦撞名，我墙内叫叶曦蓝太三次，我叫什么名字
